name: Canterbury Resources Limited
summary: Canterbury Resources Limited explores for mineral properties in Australia, Vanuatu, and Papua New Guinea. The company primarily explores for copper, molybdenum, silver, and gold deposits. Its principal properties include the Briggs porphyry copper project in Queensland, as well as the Ekoato and Bismarck porphyry copper-gold projects in Papua New Guinea. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Pyrmont, Australia.
